info.name: NAICS Lookup API
info.description:
Search 2022 6-digit NAICS codes by keyword. Returns top matches ranked by relevance.

## Prerequisites
- Python 3.10 or later
- The file `2022 NAICS Codes.xlsx` in the project folder

## How to Run the Server

**Step 1 — Open a terminal and navigate to the project folder:**
```
cd "C:\Users\David.Wolfzorn\OneDrive - ProWriters\Desktop\NAICS Lookup API"
```

**Step 2 — Install dependencies (first time only):**
```
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

**Step 3 — Start the server:**
```
uvicorn main:app --reload
```

You should see:
```
INFO: Loaded 1012 NAICS records from 2022 NAICS Codes.xlsx
INFO: Uvicorn running on http://127.0.0.1:8000
```

**Step 4 — Confirm it is running:**

Open http://localhost:8000/health in your browser. You should see:
```json
{ "status": "ok", "records_loaded": 1012 }
```

The server is now ready. Run requests from this collection against `{{baseUrl}}` (default: http://localhost:8000).

## Stopping the Server
Press `Ctrl + C` in the terminal.

## Notes
- `--reload` automatically restarts the server when you save changes to main.py. Remove it for production use.
- To use a different port: `uvicorn main:app --port 8080`
- To run from a different directory, set the data file path: `set NAICS_DATA_PATH=C:\full\path\to\2022 NAICS Codes.xlsx`

query.description: Search query (business type, activity, keywords). Min 2, max 200 characters.
Include full description text in results (true/false).
Number of results to return. Min 1, max 20. Default 5.

request.description: Search 2022 6-digit NAICS codes by title and description. Returns up to `limit` best matches ranked by relevance score.
Same as Search NAICS Codes but with full descriptions included in the response.
Return the title and description for an exact 6-digit NAICS code. Must be exactly 6 numeric digits.

response.name: 200 OK – Code found
404 Not Found – Code does not exist

request.description: Returns server status and the number of NAICS records loaded into memory.
